channel.title: Redmi 13 5G / POCO M6 Plus 5G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi 13 5G / POCO M6 Plus 5G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WNUCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 13R China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13R China

Codename: breeze

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WNUCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.4 GB

MD5: c1d4d7886e44aca6014b585e2158fa40

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WNUCNXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 13R China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13R China

Codename: breeze

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WNUCNXM | 16.0

Size: 5.7 GB

MD5: 72b6826124f991ce610e267850ca881f

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.11.0.WNUINXM Fastboot update for Redmi 13 5G / POCO M6 Plus 5G India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi 13 5G / POCO M6 Plus 5G India

Codename: breeze

Version: OS3.0.11.0.WNUINXM | 16.0

Size: 7.4 GB

MD5: 884e97ade089f082d2d3f58ad606c12d

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
